title: Thattekad Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Thattekad Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Kerala

overview.short: The Thattekkad Bird Sanctuary, covering an area of barely 25 km2, and located about 12 km from Kothamangalam (Kerala state, India), was the first bird sanctuary in Kerala.
overview.description: The Thattekkad Bird Sanctuary, covering an area of barely 25 km2, and located about 12 km from Kothamangalam (Kerala state, India), was the first bird sanctuary in Kerala. Salim Ali, one of the best known ornithologists, described this sanctuary as the richest bird habitat on peninsular India. Thattekkad literally means flat forest, and the region is a deciduous but generally moist low-land forest surrounding the Periyar River, the longest river in Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kollengode, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Kollengode is a town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. Kollengode Town is the headquarters of Kollengode Grama Panchayat and Kollengode Block Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Nelliampathi
topPlaces.description: Nelliyampathy (also spelled as Nelliampathi) is a hill station, located 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Palakkad, state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Oottara
topPlaces.description: Oottara is a small locality in Vadavannur Panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad District of Kerala State in India. The Kollengode Railway station is located at Oottara.

topPlaces.name: Kaikatty
topPlaces.description: Kaikatty is a geographic area in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. It is 26 km from Nemmara village.

topPlaces.name: Elavancherry
topPlaces.description: Elavanchery is a village and gram panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is situated on the foothills of Nelliyampathy mountain ranges, a part of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Vadavannur
topPlaces.description: Vadavannur is a village and grama panchayat near to Kollengode Town in the Palakkad District of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pothundi Dam
topPlaces.description: Pothundi Dam is an irrigation dam near Pothundi village in the Palakkad district of Kerala state, India. Constructed in the 19th century, it is considered one of the oldest dams in India.

topPlaces.name: Pokkunny Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Pokkunny Siva Temple (Malayalam: പൊക്കുന്നി ശിവ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated at Vadavannur village of Alathur of Palakkad district in Kerala state in India. The temple is a part of 108 famous Shiva temples in Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thattekad Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thattekad Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thattekad Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thattekad Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thattekad Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thattekad Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Thattekad Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thattekad Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kollengode, Palakkad, Nelliampathi, Oottara, Kaikatty, Elavancherry.
